pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade Jakarta EE API from version 9 to 10 to support Java 21 and modernize the enterprise stack.
Update Payara Micro server version to a release compatible with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 10.
Upgrade MicroProfile specification version to 6.1 to match the new Jakarta EE 10 runtime.
Introduce Log4j 2 as a logging implementation to replace or supplement existing logging mechanisms.
Add AssertJ library to improve test assertion readability and capabilities.
Include Jackson BOM and specific modules for JSON processing in system tests.
Bump internal CloudTrain common library versions to their latest 1.2.0 releases.
Configure multi-architecture Docker builds for AMD64 and ARM64/v8.
Refactor Kubernetes ingress and namespace properties to use dynamic variables and updated hostnames.
Update all standard Maven plugin versions to their latest stable releases compatible with the new build environment.
Integrate OWASP Dependency-Check plugin for automated security vulnerability scanning.
Update SonarQube scanner plugin version for improved code quality analysis.
Upgrade JaCoCo plugin version for better code coverage reporting.
Add SLF4J to JUL bridge to redirect SLF4J logs to Payara's default Java Util Logging.
Redirect Apache Commons Logging to SLF4J to unify logging output.
Move plugin configurations from profiles to the main build section for consistency and reuse.
Enable resource filtering for main resources to allow property substitution during build.
Upgrade Fabric8 Docker Maven Plugin to support newer Docker features and multi-arch builds.
Upgrade custom Compose Maven Plugin to version 5.1.0.
Upgrade custom Helm Maven Plugin to version 5.0.0.
Configure the Docker Maven plugin to use Buildx for multi-platform image building.
Remove explicit Docker build and push executions in favor of a simplified configuration, likely delegating to CI or other stages.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed <execution> blocks for 'build-docker-image' and 'push-docker-image' from docker-maven-plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the compose-maven-plugin from the commit-stage profile, likely because Docker Compose is handled externally or removed.
Remove Jacoco Maven plugin configuration from the commit-stage profile.
Remove Sonar Maven plugin configuration from the commit-stage profile.
Remove Surefire Maven plugin configuration from the commit-stage profile.
Remove Payara Micro Maven plugin from the commit-stage profile.
Remove Maven Resources plugin executions for copying Docker and Compose resources from the commit-stage profile.
Remove Failsafe Maven plugin executions for system tests from the commit-stage profile.
Remove Maven Dependency plugin execution for copying Jacoco agent from the commit-stage profile.
Add explicit skip properties for Sonar, Compose, Docker, Dependency Check, and Jacoco in the integration-test-stage profile.
Remove the Maven WAR plugin configuration from the integration-test-stage profile.
Simplify Helm deployment in integration-test-stage by removing resource copying and uninstall steps, keeping only pull and deploy.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed 'copy-helm-resources' execution and 'helm-delete' execution from helm-maven-plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Move Failsafe plugin configuration to static configuration block in integration-test-stage, removing explicit executions.
Add CloudTrain Maven repository as a plugin repository to resolve custom plugins.
Add CloudTrain Maven repository as a dependency repository to resolve custom dependencies.

README.md.general_idea: Rewrote README to provide comprehensive documentation on MicroProfile JWT Auth integration, configuration, and usage.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced brief description with detailed sections on Synopsis, configuration parameters, and code examples.

README.md.general_idea: Documented the supported multi-architecture Docker image platforms.
README.md.human_impl: Added list of supported platforms: linux/amd64 and linux/arm64/v8.

README.md.general_idea: Updated the build status badge to link to the AWS CodeBuild project.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced empty badge URL with AWS CodeBuild badge URL.

README.md.general_idea: Added instructions for pulling the Docker image and Helm chart from the registry.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Docker Pull Command' and 'Helm Pull Command' sections with specific URLs.

README.md.general_idea: Refined local build instructions and clarified the build output.
README.md.human_impl: Renamed section to 'HOW-TO build this application locally' and updated description of build results.

README.md.general_idea: Added instructions for running and stopping the showcase locally using Docker Compose.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'HOW-TO start and stop this showcase locally' section with docker compose commands.

README.md.general_idea: Added instructions for demonstrating the showcase, including endpoints and expected JSON response.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'HOW-TO demo this showcase' section with URLs and example GET request/response.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from a JRE 17 Alpine variant to a JRE 21 Alpine variant to align with the target JDK version.
Replace default garbage collection settings with ZGC and generational ZGC flags, which are optimized for Java 21.
Explicitly set the file encoding to UTF-8 via JVM argument to ensure consistent character handling.

src/test/docker/cnj-security-oidc-backen.general_idea: Remove the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml to align with modern Docker Compose specifications.
Update header comment to remove specific 'Java EE' reference in favor of generic 'application'.
src/test/docker/cnj-security-oidc-backen.human_impl: Changed comment from 'runnable Java EE application' to 'runnable application'
